title: A Long Corner Smoke
notes: Essential T-Side utility. Completely blocks off the primary CT AWPer angle looking from Long A Corner toward Long Doors.

title: Top Mid Xbox Smoke (From Spawn)
notes: Lands cleanly on top of Xbox. Blocks Mid doors line of sight from CT spawn, allowing safe, unscouted passage up to Short A.

title: B Site Doors Smoke (From tunnel)
notes: Safe pocket lineup inside Upper Tunnels. Screens off deep CT Spawn rotators and mid crossfires during a B-site execute.

title: B Site Doors Smoke (From T-Ramp)
notes: Thrown safely from outside T-Ramp. Blocks crossfires from Mid/CT spawn, enabling your entry fraggers to flood out of Tunnels safely.

title: B Site Window Smoke (From T-Ramp)
notes: Mandatory companion piece to the B Doors smoke. Completely blocks off the high window vantage point to deny defensive crossfires during a B-tunnels flood.

title: Mid door hinge
notes: Blinds mid doors AWPers to cover a clean team cross into Lower Tunnels. Lineup: Aim crosshair slightly right of the antenna, aligning the vertical crosshair line with the closed window.

title: Long car molotov
notes: Flushes out aggressive defensive anchors holding the heavy close angle at Long Car. Requires standard running forward momentum before hitting the jumpthrow bind.

title: B Back Platform Retake Molotov
notes: Crucial B-retake utility. Spreads deep to force out post-plant T anchors camping safely behind the back platform fencing into open site crossfires.

title: Smoke CT spawn from XBox
notes: Perfect tool for a Mid-to-B split execution. Mechanics: Line up your aim while fully crouched behind Xbox, stand all the way up, then execute the jumpthrow.

title: Smoke A cross from dumpster
notes: Essential for setting up an A-Site split. Completely cuts off CT Spawn and Elevator sightlines so your Long entry players can safely cross to site. Alignment: Ensure your crosshair's -1y line perfectly aligns with the wall decal.
